keynotes.text: Scarlatinin has been used, like other nosodes, for the prevention and for cure of the disease from which it takes origin. But its well-known affinity for the skin, throat and kidneys suggests its applicability for affections of those organs.

generalities.text: Clinical: Albuminuria; Nephritis; Scarlet fever; Skin affections; Throat, sore

_raw: Bell. is the nearest analogue and should be its antidote, and the various Mercuries come next. Compare also: Apis, Arsen., Rhus, Morbillin, Diphtherinum. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main
